UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's public profile data.

Website.title: Generated Website
Website.description: An entire website stored as a single HTML string.

htmlContent.description: The full HTML content of the generated website.

themeName.description: The name of the theme used for the website.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the website was created.

DomainMapping.title: Domain Mapping
DomainMapping.description: Maps a custom domain name to a user's generated website.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the website.

websiteId.description: The ID of the website to be served on this domain.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information for each user.

/domains/{domainName}.description: Public mapping of custom domains to specific websites.
